items.title: (no text)
items.author: Richard Deitsch

images.alt:
The Toronto Tempo assistant coach Olaf Lange, also the husband of Sandy Brondello, is the interim head coach tonight against the Las Vegas Aces. He was asked before the game if he felt the suspension was fair.

Lange: "I'm not going to entertain that. I think my wife handled it well. She apologized in the way, I think, she had to. I'm not in the business of judging if this is justified or not. It is what it is, and I'm here to coach."

Pacers waived guard Taelon Peter, who signed a two-year two-way contract before his rookie season.

They have Kobe Brown and Ethan Thompson on two-ways, and now one vacant spot. Jalen Slawson was the standout player at Summer League.
